title: IMD forecasts thunderstorm, lightning and gusty winds over Odisha, Andaman and Nicobar Islands - News On AIR
search_term: ("mercury soars" OR "mercury crosses" OR "temperature soars" OR "record temperature" OR "all-time high" OR "degrees Celsius" OR "maximum temperature" OR "hottest day") Andaman and Nicobar Islands
full_text: The India Meteorological Department, IMD has forecast rainfall over Odisha and Andaman and Nicobar Islands till tomorrow. Similar conditions are likely to prevail over East Madhya Pradesh, Vidarbha, Chhattisgarh, Assam, Meghalaya, Gangetic West Bengal and Telangana. IMD said that there will be a gradual rise in maximum temperature by 3 to 4 degrees Celsius over Northwest parts of the country during next seven days. The weather agency also predicted squally weather to prevail over parts of Bay of Bengal and adjoining Sri Lanka coasts today.
